## Verification

- [ ] `npm run build`
- [ ] `npm test -- --run`
- [ ] `npm run public-check`

## Safety Checklist

- [ ] No credentials, QR codes, cookies, logs, screenshots, or local state files are included.
- [ ] Inbound Weixin text is still sent to Codex exactly as received.
- [ ] Windows desktop automation changes are covered by tests when applicable.
